notes: BLE TX power back to 0 dBm. The v2.2.3 bump to +3 dBm was on the theory the mid-ride drop-out was a range issue — turned out to be iOS suspending the app and stopping the writes. Range never had a real problem. Back to 0 dBm for the ~3-5 mA notify-path saving. If field tests turn up an actual range issue, easy to revert.
